name: 汉典
description: Comprehensive online Chinese dictionary — definitions, pinyin, stroke order, radical breakdown, and classical/literary usage examples.

name: 字源
description: Character etymology and evolution — view oracle bone, bronze, seal, and clerical script forms side by side.

name: 千篇字典
description: Compact dictionary entries with common words, idioms, and example sentences that use the character.

name: Baidu·Google
description: General web search fallback — useful when a character or phrase isn't well covered by the dedicated dictionaries above.

name: 多功能字庫
description: Academic-grade character database from the Chinese University of Hong Kong — etymology, Cantonese/Mandarin readings, and historical script forms.

name: 文学网
description: Dictionary site with stroke-order animations, radical index, and phonetic lookup.

name: 成语
description: Chinese 成语 Chengyu (Idioms) Look Up
